scene.description: A photorealistic wide daytime exterior of a 1,500 square foot irregular polygon residential common-space entry area in Lafayette Colorado suburban Front Range, Boulder County. Narrower elongated polygon footprint than Site One, sited in a residential townhome-adjacent common area. Compacted tan soil with sparse weeds, a few stray rocks, dry leaf litter, and a narrow strip of undisturbed dry grass along one edge. Low stucco boundary wall at the back.
scene.weather: clear blue sky, Front Range atmospheric haze
scene.location: Lafayette, Colorado, Boulder County (40.0004 N, -105.110 W)

materials.type: compacted tan soil, sparse weeds, dry litter

camera.framing: eye-level wide shot emphasizing the narrower elongated polygon proportion, horizontal composition, back wall on upper third

composition.background: stucco wall and distant cottonwoods and scrub oak
